violations.text: Allergen advisory statement is not present on menus. Allergen advisory statement required to be present to notify consumers of their obligation to inform staff of any food allergies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of the icemachine in the kitchen were observed with an accumulation of pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Burgers and steaks are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. Once consumer advisory is added to menu, identifying symbol to be added with associated foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
The receptacles in toilet room are lacking covers. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary disposals. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher at the bar area was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machines at the kitchen and bar area observed with an accumulation of brown/black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024
2 door refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of chopper was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

Beef was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Proper thawing methods reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the employee's bathroom. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and bar areas were lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Food contact surfaces of ice machine at the kitchen and knives at the bar area were observed with an accumulation of pink residue and food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Working containers of spices, flour and rice are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of rice cooker. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

Utensils such a fork, knives, spooks, and take out containers in the kitchen area are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen and bar are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the employee's bathroom. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
The plumbing from water heater is observed leaking in a container. Picture taken. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023
Establishment is lacking a grease refuse container. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage rom area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2023

The floor in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
